calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion For Assignment Etc.
Off Calendar Apr-24-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, appearing for the plaintiff/moving party Align Technology, Inc.
No appearancy by any other party or counsel.

Plaintiff stipulates to the matter being heard by Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein.

Matter called, no argument is held.

There being no other appearance, the tentative ruling is adopted: Plaintiff's motion is unopposed and in all respects granted. Plaintiff's counsel is to prepare a revised order and mail it to Judge Pro Tem Steven Stein for review and signature.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein, Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda, Matter Not Reported. (302/JPT)
